task_completion.description: Verify the diagram title is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Secure Entry Timing Analysis' should be clearly visible as the title or heading of the diagram on the EdrawMax canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify all three required lifelines are present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three distinct lifelines or components labeled 'Card Reader', 'Controller', and 'Door Lock' should be visible in the timing diagram.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct states are defined for each lifeline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Y-axis or state labels for the lifelines must show: 'Idle' and 'Reading' for Card Reader; 'Wait', 'Process', and 'Grant' for Controller; 'Locked' and 'Unlocked' for Door Lock.

task_completion.description: Verify the timing sequence for the Card Reader and Controller.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The timing line for 'Card Reader' must step/transition to 'Reading' at the T=10 mark. The timing line for 'Controller' must step to 'Process' at T=15 and step to 'Grant' at T=25.

task_completion.description: Verify the timing sequence for the Door Lock.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The timing line for 'Door Lock' must step/transition to 'Unlocked' at the T=30 mark, and step back down to 'Locked' at the T=50 mark.

task_completion.description: Verify the diagram is saved as .eddx and exported as .png in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the EdrawMax 'Save As' and 'Export' dialogs targeting '/home/ga/Documents/' with the filenames 'entry_timing.eddx' and 'entry_timing.png', or a file manager/terminal showing these files exist in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Wondershare EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the EdrawMax application interface being actively used (toolbars, canvas, menus), rather than a script or command-line tool generating the image.

integrity.description: Verify the PNG was genuinely exported from the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the EdrawMax export menu or dialog being used, ensuring the agent didn't just download a pre-made image or rename an unrelated file to .png.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't attempt to mock the .eddx file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The .eddx file should be saved via EdrawMax's native save functionality. There should be no evidence of the agent writing plain text into a file named entry_timing.eddx.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Title: 'Secure Entry Timing Analysis'. Required Lifelines: 'Card Reader', 'Controller', 'Door Lock'. Required States: 'Idle', 'Reading', 'Wait', 'Process', 'Grant', 'Locked', 'Unlocked'. Expected Output Paths: /home/ga/Documents/entry_timing.eddx and /home/ga/Documents/entry_timing.png.
